---
title: "Rebecca Franke"
name: "Rebecca Franke"
image: "/images/profile_pics/rebecca_franke.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** The antipredatory role of army-ant-following in Neotropical birds: an experimental test"
location: "**Research location:** Panama"
dates: "**Dates:** 2020"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "10"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
